inputs.label: Bill Amount
inputs.businessContext: The total bill amount before tip and any additional charges.

businessContext_i18n.en: The total bill amount before tip and any additional charges.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bahşiş ve ek ücretlerden önceki toplam fatura tutarı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der gesamte Rechnungsbetrag vor Trinkgeld und etwaigen Zusatzgebühren.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le montant total de la facture avant le pourboire et tout supplément.
businessContext_i18n.es: El monto total de la cuenta antes de la propina y cualquier cargo adicional.

inputs.label: Tip Percentage
inputs.businessContext: The percentage of the bill to be given as tip.

businessContext_i18n.en: The percentage of the bill to be given as tip.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Prozentsatz des Rechnungsbetrags, der als Trinkgeld gegeben wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage du montant de la facture à donner comme pourboire.
businessContext_i18n.es: El porcentaje de la cuenta que se dará como propina.

inputs.label: Number of People
inputs.businessContext: The number of people sharing the bill equally.

businessContext_i18n.en: The number of people sharing the bill equally.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Faturayı eşit olarak paylaşan kişi sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Anzahl der Personen, die die Rechnung gleichmäßig teilen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de personnes partageant la facture à parts égales.
businessContext_i18n.es: El número de personas que comparten la cuenta por igual.

inputs.label: Service Charge Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Additional service charge percentage added to the bill, if any.

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional service charge percentage added to the bill, if any.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Varsa faturaya eklenen ek servis ücreti yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzlicher Servicegebührenprozentsatz, der der Rechnung hinzugefügt wird, falls vorhanden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de frais de service supplémentaire ajouté à la facture, le cas échéant.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de cargo adicional por servicio añadido a la factura, si corresponde.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
